title: Fallout of War Piles Economic Pain Onto Europe’s Political Stress
summary_full: Europe is finding itself on the outs with Russia, China and the U.S., in what’s amounting to its very own “Mean Girls” moment.
summary_public: Europe is finding itself on the outs with Russia, China and the U.S., in what’s amounting to its very own “Mean Girls” moment.
